requirement_topic.en: ONEE Grid-Connection and Ancillary Services Requirements for Storage
requirement_topic.zh: ONEE储能并网与辅助服务要求
requirement_topic.zht: ONEE儲能併網與輔助服務要求

summary.en: ONEE, Morocco's national electricity utility, is the grid operator responsible for transmission and distribution grid-connection approvals. A BESS connected to the Moroccan grid must meet ONEE's technical requirements for frequency response, voltage support, reactive-power control, protection coordination, anti-islanding, power quality, metering, and communications. For utility-scale BESS providing ancillary services, ONEE may require a project-specific connection study, a power-purchase or ancillary-service agreement, and SCADA / telemetry integration. The regulatory framework includes loi 13-09 (renewable energy production), Decree 2-10-578 (renewable energy project conditions), Law 40-19 (amending loi 13-09 to formally integrate energy storage into the framework), and Loi 82-21 (relative à l'autoproduction d'énergie électrique, covering self-generation with storage). ONEE publishes a Capacité d'Accueil (grid hosting capacity) map to indicate available grid absorption capacity at connection points.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥国家电力和饮用水局（ONEE）是负责输配电网并网批准的电网运营商。接入摩洛哥电网的BESS须满足ONEE对频率响应、电压支撑、无功控制、保护配合、防孤岛、电能质量、计量和通信的技术要求。提供辅助服务的公用事业规模BESS，ONEE可能要求提交项目级接入研究、购电或辅助服务协议及SCADA/远动集成。适用监管框架包括loi 13-09（可再生能源生产）、Decree 2-10-578（可再生能源项目条件）、Law 40-19（修订loi 13-09，将储能正式纳入框架）和Loi 82-21（关于自发电，涵盖带储能的自发电）。ONEE发布Capacité d'Accueil（电网接纳容量）图，显示各并网点的电网可用接纳容量。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥國家電力和飲用水局（ONEE）是負責輸配電網併網批准的電網營運商。接入摩洛哥電網的BESS須滿足ONEE對頻率響應、電壓支撐、無功控制、保護配合、防孤島、電能質量、計量和通訊的技術要求。提供輔助服務的公用事業規模BESS，ONEE可能要求提交項目級接入研究、購電或輔助服務協議及SCADA/遠動集成。適用監管框架包括loi 13-09（再生能源生產）、Decree 2-10-578（再生能源項目條件）、Law 40-19（修訂loi 13-09，將儲能正式納入框架）和Loi 82-21（關於自發電，涵蓋帶儲能的自發電）。ONEE發布Capacité d'Accueil（電網接納容量）圖，顯示各併網點的電網可用接納容量。

standards_or_laws: Loi 13-09 relative aux énergies renouvelables (as amended by loi 58-15)
Law 40-19 (amending loi 13-09 — formal integration of energy storage into the renewable energy framework)
Loi 82-21 relative à l'autoproduction d'énergie électrique (self-generation with storage)
Decree 2-10-578 (conditions for renewable energy project authorisation)
ONEE technical grid-connection rules for storage and generation
ONEE Capacité d'Accueil (grid hosting capacity map)

summary.en: China BESS grid-connection evidence commonly references GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120 (for electrochemical energy storage stations — testing), and project-specific grid-connection study reports submitted to the local grid company. These Chinese documents address technically similar requirements but do not substitute for ONEE grid-connection study acceptance, Moroccan project authorisation, or transmission grid code compliance.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网证据通常引用GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120（储能电站检测）及提交给地方电网公司的项目级并网研究报告。这些中国文件在技术上涵盖类似要求，但不能替代ONEE并网研究认可、摩洛哥项目授权或输电网规范合规。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網證據通常引用GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120（儲能電站檢測）及提交給地方電網公司的項目級併網研究報告。這些中國文件在技術上涵蓋類似要求，但不能替代ONEE併網研究認可、摩洛哥項目授權或輸電網規範合規。

standards_or_laws: Chinese local grid company grid-connection study report

gap.en: Prepare a Morocco-specific ONEE grid studies package covering: frequency response capability and settings for the 50 Hz Moroccan grid, reactive-power and voltage support, protection relay coordination, anti-islanding for island-risk sites, metering and revenue measurement, SCADA / IEC 61968 or ONEE communications interface, and emergency shutdown and black-start capability where applicable. Confirm project authorisation route under loi 13-09 and Decree 2-10-578 with the Moroccan Ministry of Energy Transition and Sustainable Development.
gap.zh: 应准备摩洛哥特定的ONEE并网研究文件包，涵盖：摩洛哥50 Hz电网频率响应能力与设置、无功和电压支撑、保护继电器配合、孤岛风险站点防孤岛、计量与电费计量、SCADA/IEC 61968或ONEE通信接口，以及适用时的紧急停机和黑启动能力。应与摩洛哥能源转型和可持续发展部确认loi 13-09和Decree 2-10-578下的项目授权路径。
gap.zht: 應準備摩洛哥特定的ONEE併網研究文件包，涵蓋：摩洛哥50 Hz電網頻率響應能力與設定、無功和電壓支撐、保護繼電器配合、孤島風險站點防孤島、計量與電費計量、SCADA/IEC 61968或ONEE通訊介面，以及適用時的緊急停機和黑啟動能力。應與摩洛哥能源轉型和可持續發展部確認loi 13-09和Decree 2-10-578下的項目授權路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for any BESS connected to the Moroccan grid under ONEE technical rules; project authorisation under loi 13-09 or loi 47-09 is legally required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid-connected BESS under CNCA and grid company approval; not transferable as ONEE or Moroccan project authorisation

source.publisher: Office National de l'Electricité et de l'Eau Potable (ONEE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 grid documentation does not satisfy ONEE grid-connection acceptance. Prepare a Morocco-specific ONEE grid studies package and obtain loi 13-09 project authorisation before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558-2023并网文件不满足ONEE并网接受要求。调试前应准备摩洛哥特定的ONEE并网研究文件包并取得loi 13-09项目授权。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558-2023併網文件不滿足ONEE併網接受要求。調試前應準備摩洛哥特定的ONEE併網研究文件包並取得loi 13-09項目授權。
